← All tools

Static Map Generator

Frame a spot on the map, drop a pin or two, then turn it into a PNG image or copy-paste embed code. Everything happens in your browser — no API keys, no accounts.

    Click the map to drop a pin · drag / zoom to frame your shot · the dashed box is exactly what gets exported.

    Pins

    Color

      Click anywhere on the map to drop a pin. Pins are drawn into the exported image.

      Output size

      ×

      Export PNG

      Frame a view above, then generate — the map tiles are stitched into one image right here in your browser.

      Embed on a website

      An interactive mini-map using openstreetmap.org's official embed — it mirrors the frame and size above, and updates live as you move the map.

      Map data & search © OpenStreetMap contributors — place search calls the Nominatim service, and the PNG export fetches tiles straight from openstreetmap.org. That's fine for light, personal use; anything heavy or high-traffic should use a commercial tile provider (see the OSM tile usage policy). · a max tool
